response.justification: Exceptionally experienced full-stack engineer (16+ years) with strong alignment to primary backend stack (TypeScript, Node.js) and direct AI-agent infrastructure experience. Current role at Acme explicitly involves MCP and agentic workflows, matching stated requirements. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js and modern React depth, but extensive Node.js and architectural background suggest rapid ramp-up. Over-qualified in breadth and seniority but brings valuable architectural thinking and infrastructure expertise.
strengths: AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience directly matching stated requirement; current role explicitly includes this domain
16+ years as full-stack engineer with multiple senior/staff roles, far exceeding 6+ year requirement; strong backend and DevOps expertise
Demonstrated architectural thinking through TDD, CI/CD practices, Kubernetes/Docker infrastructure, and software craftsmanship across multiple companies
concerns: Nest.js not mentioned on resume despite being primary stack; extensive Node.js background mitigates but represents some ramp-up time
React experience appears limited to one role (Pinepoint Systems pricing); unclear how recent or deep modern React knowledge is
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly listed; TDD and testing culture mentioned but framework proficiency unclear

key_factors.factor: Extensive full-stack seniority and architectural depth
Nest.js and modern React framework gaps
